summary: Iteration 35 — Platform Vision 2.0 canvas-first wave. Backend: 13/13 pytest pass. Frontend: palette renders with all data-testids (search, dept chips, type tiles), search + chip multi-select filters work, drop popover opens with correctly pre-filled server-generated code matching pattern ZONE-DIV-STN-LOC-SZ-TYPE-NNNN, Escape closes popover without creating.
action_items: Optional UX: After Escape closes the drop popover, the palette 'Placing: <type>' mode is also cleared — meaning the user must re-click the palette tile to retry. If the intent is 'cancel this drop but keep placing mode', preserve the selected tile after Escape. Current behaviour is acceptable but worth confirming with PM.
critical_code_review_comments: Asset code generator correctly produces ZONE-DIV-STN-LOC-SZ-TYPE-NNNN; verified live as 'ECR-DHN-DHN-PLATFORM-SZ-A-CEILING-0001'. Atomic sequence via $inc on asset_code_counters is race-safe.
auto-create rejects asset_type without department (defense-in-depth) even though the migration purge guarantees none exist — good belt-and-suspenders.
preview-code is non-destructive (reads counter without incrementing); the comment in the code correctly warns that an actual create may produce a different number under concurrency.
_validate_asset_type_payload raises 400 on empty department_id (caught after Pydantic). Missing department_id (no key) triggers Pydantic 422 — UI should handle both.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the parts I could exercise — palette render+filter, popover open with pre-filled code, ESC dismissal. Full create/delete-via-AlertDialog/admin-form-disabled-submit not exercised end-to-end via UI due to drag-drop HTML5 limitations in headless mode, but their backend contracts (auto-create, override conflict, dept validation) all pass under pytest.

seed_data_creation: All asset-types and assets created during pytest are cleaned up in the session teardown (TEST_* prefixed). No leftovers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_canvas_first_iter35.py — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set; uses SA001/admin123 and DHANBAD seed (Sub-Zone A under PLATFORM 1, code SZ-A). Frontend palette testids: palette-search, palette-dept-chip-{deptId}, palette-type-{typeId}, palette-clear-filters (only renders when a filter is active). Drop popover testids: asset-drop-popover, asset-drop-code-input, asset-drop-confirm. Delete alert: delete-asset-alert, delete-asset-confirm. Admin asset-type form: at-submit, at-dept-required-warn. Click-to-place flow (click palette tile → click canvas) is the most reliable way to open the popover in automated tests; pure HTML5 drag is flaky in headless mode. After pressing Escape on the popover the 'Placing' mode is also cleared on the palette — re-click the tile to retry.
